creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text:
Created attachment 209291
Unified diff to patch distinfo & Makefile

I managed to alter the port framework for fs-uae-launcher to update it to the 3.0.2 version. portlint checks out ok and I've successfuly built it using poudriere (including fetching the distfile.) I've also successfully installed it using pkg and run it.

I've attached a couple of unified diffs to update the Makefile and distinfo files.

The one thing I didn't figure out was how to properly use the TIMESTAMP field in the distinfo file.
